summary: DPA page successfully renders with proper diner aesthetic, legal content structure, and navigation. All core requirements from screen spec met with good visual hierarchy and brand consistency.

violations.description: Page background appears to be using the correct diner teal #9fd8d2, but could benefit from slightly more saturated rendering to ensure full brand consistency
The main content card uses shadow-sm styling as documented exception for legal longform articles, which is correct per the manifesto

actions.description: Confirm the teal background color exactly matches #9fd8d2 specification
Validate that all section headings match the legal route heading contract as specified
Ensure the support email link uses the canonical support mailbox contract
